de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct

Class DoBreak

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaSourceElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaProgramElement
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
          • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct.ProgramTransformer
            • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct.DoBreak
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Expression, ExpressionContainer, ModelElement, NamedModelElement, NamedProgramElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, Reference, MemberReference, NameReference, PackageReferenceContainer, ReferencePrefix, ReferenceSuffix, TypeReference, TypeReferenceContainer, TypeReferenceInfix, SourceElement, Statement, StatementContainer, SVSubstitute

    public class DoBreak
extends ProgramTransformer
    This class performs a labeled break. This means l1:l2:{l3:{l4:{break l3;}} ...} becomes l1:l2:{...}

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      DoBreak(LabeledStatement labeledBreak)
      creates a do-break ProgramTransformer

      a helper method to perform the symbolic execution of the doBreak metaconstruct.
      ProgramElement transform(ProgramElement pe, Services services, SVInstantiations insts)
      performs the program transformation needed for symbolic program transformation

    • Constructor Detail

      • DoBreak

        public DoBreak(LabeledStatement labeledBreak)
        creates a do-break ProgramTransformer
        Parameters:
        labeledBreak - the LabeledStatement contained by the meta construct

    • Method Detail

      • doBreak

        private ProgramElement doBreak(NonTerminalProgramElement block,
                               Label breakLabel,
                               Break b)
        a helper method to perform the symbolic execution of the doBreak metaconstruct.
        Parameters:
        block - the NonTerminalProgramElement to go through and look for the label
        breakLabel - the Label the break statement marked

      • transform

        public ProgramElement transform(ProgramElement pe,
                                Services services,
                                SVInstantiations insts)
        performs the program transformation needed for symbolic program transformation
        Specified by:
        transform in class ProgramTransformer
        Parameters:
        services - the Services with all necessary information about the java programs
        pe - the ProgramElement on which the execution is performed
        insts - the instantiations of the schemavariables
        Returns:
        the transformated program
